source.name: section 2

rubrics.title: Creating an FFT object
rubrics.description: Student correctly creates an FFT object to analyze the music. The FFT object should be properly initialized in the sketch.

rubrics.title: Setting up FFT parameters
rubrics.description: Student configures the FFT object with 512 bins and uses 0.5 as the smoothing factor as specified in the instructions.

rubrics.title: Continuous music analysis
rubrics.description: Student implements code that continually analyzes the music (likely in the draw function), ensuring the FFT analysis runs throughout the sketch execution.

rubrics.title: Implementation of showFft function
rubrics.description: Student correctly implements the provided showFft function in their sketch and passes the FFT analysis results to it.

rubrics.title: Functional visualization
rubrics.description: When music plays, the visualization correctly displays text showing the number of elements with values greater than 0, with this number typically reaching the 300's as specified in the instructions.
